corrections.current:
ὁ δὲ Μακκαβαῖος αἰσθητήριον διεξαγα-
γόντα
corrections.correct:
ὁ δὲ Μακκαβαῖος αἰσθητήριον διεξαγα-
γόντος
corrections.note: Genitive absolute in the printed text: αἰσθητηρίου διεξαγαγόντος? The visible ending in the scan is clearly -γοντος, not -γοντα.
The scan appears to read αἰσθητήριον as transcribed; no correction intended here beyond the participle ending.

corrections.current: καὶ νῦν, ἅγιε παντὸς ἁγιασμοῦ κύριε
corrections.correct: καὶ νῦν, ἄγιε παντὸς ἁγιασμοῦ κύριε
corrections.note: Printed text has ἄγιε, not ἅγιε.
Apparatus has ταυτα. Va, not ταυτον.
The apparatus line begins with 28 δυσχερως (sic) V | αθετησε V | αθε-τησιν A; the reading αθετησε V is omitted.
Correct siglum is Va, not Vd.
Printed apparatus appears to read το μεγ. V* (το με., Va), not του μεγ. V* (το μεγ., Va).
The V* reading is φασαντων, not φαιαντων.
Apparatus entry is νεων V, corresponding to νεών in the text.

uncertain.note: The noun before διεξαγαγόντος is difficult; it may be αἰσθητήριον as transcribed, but the syntax is odd. Only the participle ending is certain from the scan.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct; one clear body error at line 36 and a participle ending at line 30. Apparatus contains several misreadings and one omission. Page number 703 at foot is correctly outside the transcription body/apparatus.
